xtermjs:cursor.hide.note: Headless mode doesn't track cursor visibility

xtermjs:sgr.underline.double.note: Headless mode treats all underline variants as single

xtermjs:sgr.underline.curly.note: Headless mode treats all underline variants as single

xtermjs:sgr.underline.dotted.note: Headless mode treats all underline variants as single

xtermjs:sgr.underline.dashed.note: Headless mode treats all underline variants as single

xtermjs:scrollback.scroll-up.note: Headless API reads from buffer, not viewport after scroll

xtermjs:sgr.blink.note: Headless mode doesn't expose blink attribute

xtermjs:sgr.hidden.note: Headless mode doesn't expose hidden attribute

xtermjs:text.wide.emoji.note: Headless mode reports emoji as single-width

xtermjs:modes.reverse-video.note: Headless mode doesn't track reverse video mode

ghostty-native:extensions.osc2-title.note: Title not exposed via native Zig API

ghostty-native:sgr.blink.note: Ghostty parses blink but doesn't expose it in cell data

ghostty-native:sgr.hidden.note: Ghostty parses hidden but doesn't expose it in cell data

alacritty:erase.screen.all.note: Alacritty's ED 2 doesn't clear scrollback content from buffer

alacritty:sgr.underline.double.note: Alacritty only supports single underline in headless mode

wezterm:sgr.fg.256.note: Backend returns palette index instead of resolved RGB

wezterm:sgr.bg.256.note: Backend returns palette index instead of resolved RGB
